description.value:
**Benefit:** A verdant spell affects plant creatures (even mindless plant creatures) as if they weren’t immune to mind-affecting effects, but it has no effect on other types of creatures. This feat works only on mind-affecting spells. Level Increase: +2 (a verdant spell uses up a spell slot 2 levels higher than the spell’s actual level.)

**Normal:** Creatures of the plant type are immune to mind-affecting effects.
